key_measures: Champion of AI Programme launched to prepare students for the AI economy.
Special schemes supporting tech startups, digital skills development, and innovation platforms.
Extension of maternity leave to 1 year (first 6 months fully paid, remaining 6 months half-pay).
Paternity leave increased from 4 weeks to 6 weeks.
Introduction of 1 paid day of menstrual leave per month for women experiencing severe symptoms.
State Age Pension (SAP) reforms restoration electively from age 60, with full SAP applied for monthly income below Rs 14,000.
Tax holidays for startups and support for business AI/digital integration.
Launch of a Golden Visa scheme for tech, AI, and biotechnology investments.
SME facilitation and streamlined licensing processes under the forthcoming Business Facilitation Bill.
